name: New Year's Day
title: New Year's Day Countdown - Track the Start of 2027
description: Counting down to New Year's Day? Our high-precision global tracker shows exactly how many days, hours, and minutes remain until the world celebrates the start of the next year.
content: New Year's Day is a celebration of new beginnings, marked by festivities, resolutions, and global countdowns. Whether you're planning a party or tracking the ball drop, our precise holiday timer ensures you never miss a second of the transition to the new year.

name: Christmas Day
title: Christmas Countdown - How Many Days Until Christmas?
description: Stay updated with our Christmas countdown. Track the precisely calculated time remaining until the most wonderful time of the year with our high-tech holiday tracker.
content: Christmas Day is widely observed as both a cultural holiday and a significant spiritual event for billions of people around the world. From gift-giving and festive meals to peaceful reflection, our countdown helps you prepare for the magic of the holiday season.

name: Halloween
title: Halloween Countdown - Track the Spooky Season
description: Count down to Halloween with our real-time tracker. Perfect for planning your costumes, parties, and haunted events with precision.
content: Halloween is a time for creativity, spookiness, and community fun. Whether you're gearing up for trick-or-treating or a horror movie marathon, stay perfectly on schedule with our high-tech countdown.

name: Thanksgiving Day
title: Thanksgiving Countdown - Prepare for the Feast
description: Track the time until Thanksgiving Day with our festive countdown. Ensure your holiday preparations are perfectly timed for the big day.
content: Thanksgiving is a national holiday in many countries, dedicated to expressing gratitude and sharing a harvest feast with loved ones. Keep track of the days remaining to coordinate your dinner and travel plans.

name: Independence Day
title: Independence Day Countdown - Celebrate Liberty
description: How long until the 4th of July? Track the precisely calculated time remaining until the next Independence Day celebration with our high-tech tracker.
content: Independence Day is a major national holiday celebrating the birth of freedom and democracy. From fireworks and parades to backyard barbecues, stay perfectly on schedule with our high-precision countdown.
